title: cohniella
intro: Cohniella is a genus of flowering plants in the family Campanulaceae, commonly known as the cohniella plant. It is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The cohniella plant has several health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating wounds, and soothing digestive issues. Herbal preparations of the cohniella plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
